title: Acolyte
description: Addon for Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks. Demons capable of using spells against you, recruit help to defeat them
body:
Acolyte introduces a new type of spellcasters, new structure and a brand new recruit system


## Featuring:

Entities :
- Horn Merchant (magic wandering trader)
- Human Mage & Demon Mage (with biome variations)
- Human Warrior & Demon Warrior (with biome variations)
- Human Archer & Demon Arche (with biome variations)
- Lieutenant mini boss (demon)

Structures :
- 5 Taverns
- 7 Watchtowers
- 2 Towers
- 3 Castles
- 1 Lieutenant Castle

Gameplay :
- Recruit system : hire allies for a limited time in exchange for emeralds.
- Horns trading : buy scrolls and magic stuff in exchange for demon horns.
